rationale: Keep: the citing paper’s note says it "extends prior PMG signaling models" and argues heterogeneity is not necessary, while the cited 2006 paper is exactly a PMG signaling model with vertical differentiation/service heterogeneity and informed vs. uninformed consumers. The overlap in core constructs (PMG signaling mechanism, consumer information structure, equilibrium conditions) indicates the citation is likely a substantive theory/comparison reference rather than an incidental mention.
